texto: It was one of those rare smiles with a quality of eternal reassurance in it, that you may come across four or five times in life. It faced--or seemed to face--the whole external world for an instant, and then concentrated on you with an irresistible prejudice in your favor.
autor: F. Scott Fitzgerald's The Great Gatsby
explicacao: Citação de F.
